name: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 expense reports/month tool
description: For HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 expense reports/month, incomplete submissions cause reimbursement delays. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Incomplete expense report submissions lead to delays in reimbursement.
